header.title: DataTable
header.subtitle: Feature-rich table with built-in client-side sort, pagination, search, and row selection. Built on top of the Table primitives — accepts a columns config and a data array and handles all interaction state internally.

basic.title: Basic
basic.description: Minimal setup: pass columns and data. Set sortable: true per column to enable sort. getRowId provides a stable ID for each row — required for selection and recommended for correctness.

badges.title: With status badges
badges.description: Use the render function in a column definition to return any React node — useful for status chips and formatted values.

avatars.title: With avatars
avatars.description: Custom render for the name column — Avatar and name text side by side. Stack additional info below the name for a compact user cell.

pagination.title: With pagination
pagination.description: Pagination controls appear automatically when the total row count exceeds pageSize. The showing text reflects the current sort and filter state.

search.title: With search
search.description: Pass searchable to render a filter input above the table. Filters all columns by their raw string value — col.render output is not searched. The page resets to 1 on each keystroke.

selection.title: With row selection
selection.description: Pass selectable and getRowId to enable checkbox selection. onSelectionChange is called synchronously on every change with a Set of selected IDs. Cross-page selections are preserved when paginating.

loading.title: Loading state
loading.description: Pass loading to show skeleton rows while data is being fetched.

empty.title: Empty state
empty.description: An empty data array shows a full-width message row. The default message is localised. Override it with the emptyMessage prop.

serverSide.title: Server-side note
serverSide.description: DataTable manages sort, search, and pagination entirely on the client. For server-side pagination or search, manage those states externally and pass the already-paginated slice as data. Use the loading prop to show skeletons while a new page loads.

feedbackPattern.title: Feedback pattern
feedbackPattern.description: Standard pattern for components that fetch data: skeleton while loading, ErrorState on error, DataTable when data is ready. DataTable handles its own empty message — no separate EmptyState needed.

keyboard.title: Keyboard navigation
keyboard.description: Sort buttons and pagination controls are focusable with Tab and activated with Enter or Space. Checkboxes support Space to toggle. The select-all checkbox in the header toggles all visible rows on the current page.

props.title: DataTable props
props.description: DataTable is a generic component — T is inferred from the data array.

columnProps.title: Column props
columnProps.description: Each entry in the columns array configures one column.

empty.customMessage: No users match the selected filters.

props.columns: Column definitions — header label, data key, optional render function, sortable flag, and className.
props.data: Array of data rows. The generic T is inferred from this prop.
props.loading: Shows skeleton rows while true. Hides the table and search toolbar.
props.pageSize: Rows per page. Defaults to 10. Pagination controls appear when total rows exceed this.
props.selectable: Enables a checkbox column on the left. Requires getRowId.
props.getRowId: Returns a stable string ID for each row. Required when selectable is true.
props.emptyMessage: Overrides the default empty message shown when data is an empty array.
props.searchable: Renders a search input above the table. Filters all columns by raw string value.
props.searchPlaceholder: Placeholder for the search input. Falls back to the common.table.searchPlaceholder translation.
props.onSelectionChange: Called synchronously on every selection change with a Set of selected row IDs.
props.className: Extra classes applied to the root container.

columnProps.key: Data key — the raw value at this key is displayed unless render is provided.
columnProps.render: Custom cell renderer. Overrides the default key-based string display.
columnProps.sortable: Enables a sort button in the column header.
columnProps.className: Extra classes applied to both TableHead and TableCell for this column.
